summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureVision AI Cyber Threat Detection Web Application. Backend APIs achieved 92.3% success rate with all core features working. Frontend registration, authentication, and dashboard functionality verified. Real AI integration via OpenAI GPT-5.2 and IP geolocation services operational.

integration_issues.note: Core registration and dashboard functionality verified successfully
